title: Insider Data Theft Investigation - Project Titan
executive_summary: The insider theft evidence shows off-hours access, credential exposure, cloud storage research, USB insertion, and hidden archive transfer activity.
forensic_conclusion: Evidence supports a critical insider data theft investigation. Preserve endpoint image, removable media, authentication logs, and cloud access logs.
key_findings: Off-hours login after failed privileged access attempts
Cloud upload research and removable media transfer
Hidden archive creation with high entropy
